name: Flour Weights
recipeInstructions:
1. Weigh out 125 grams of all-purpose flour for USDA recipes.
2. Weigh out 130 grams of all-purpose flour for Gold Medal recipes.
3. Weigh out 120 grams of whole wheat flour for USDA recipes.
4. Weigh out 128 grams of whole wheat flour for Gold Medal recipes.
5. Weigh out 127 grams of bread flour for USDA recipes.
6. Weigh out 135 grams of bread flour for Gold Medal recipes.
7. Weigh out 102 grams of rye flour for USDA recipes.
8. King Arthur recommends weighing all flour types at 4 ounces (113 grams) per cup, but this may require adjusting the water content in your recipe to achieve the desired consistency.
